evidence: Enjoyed an excellent cast in this thriller.
Story a little confusing but still compelling
Not as strong as season one, but performances and production excellent
The chemistry between the doctor and Rose makes each episode exciting.
Great writing, wonderful actors, exciting videos
Enjoy watching David Tennant and his wide range of emotions.
Interesting, surprising, great music and life insights.
Spellbounding performance by David Tennant and the cast and production were excellent.

summary: The user has a strong preference for thrillers and dramas, particularly enjoying fast-paced narratives with high production quality. They show loyalty to David Tennant and appreciate emotional depth and sensory experiences in their viewing choices.
